creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #8)

That sounds reasonable, thanks for explanation. But if I follow your advice and add

BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}setuptools>0:devel/py-setuptools@${PY_FLAVOR}

I get the same error as reported in comment #5 (missing wheel dependency).

Any idea?
